name: osqueryi
description: Your OS as a high-performance relational database

options.name: --flagfile
options.description: Line-delimited file of additional flags

options.name: --D
options.description: Run as a daemon process

options.name: --S
options.description: Run as a shell process

options.name: --alarm_timeout
options.description: Seconds to allow for shutdown. Minimum is 10

options.name: --carver_block_size
options.description: Size of blocks used for POSTing data back to remote endpoints

options.name: --carver_compression
options.description: Compress archives using zstd prior to upload (default false)

options.name: --carver_continue_endpoint
options.description: TLS/HTTPS endpoint that receives carved content after session creation

options.name: --carver_disable_function
options.description: Disable the osquery file carver function (default true)

options.name: --carver_expiry
options.description: Seconds to store successful carve result metadata (in carves table)

options.name: --carver_start_endpoint
options.description: TLS/HTTPS init endpoint for forensic carver

options.name: --config_accelerated_refresh
options.description: Interval to wait if reading a configuration fails

options.name: --config_check
options.description: Check the format of an osquery config and exit

options.name: --config_dump
options.description: Dump the contents of the configuration, then exit

options.name: --config_enable_backup
options.description: Backup config and use it when refresh fails

options.name: --config_path
options.description: Path to JSON config file

options.name: --config_plugin
options.description: Config plugin name

options.name: --config_refresh
options.description: Optional interval in seconds to re-read configuration

options.name: --config_tls_endpoint
options.description: TLS/HTTPS endpoint for config retrieval

options.name: --config_tls_max_attempts
options.description: Number of attempts to retry a TLS config request

options.name: --daemonize
options.description: Attempt to daemonize (POSIX only)

options.name: --database_dump
options.description: Dump the contents of the backing store

options.name: --database_path
options.description: If using a disk-based backing store, specify a path

options.name: --disable_carver
options.description: Disable the osquery file carver (default true)

options.name: --disable_enrollment
options.description: Disable enrollment functions on related config/logger plugins

options.name: --disable_extensions
options.description: Disable extension API

options.name: --disable_reenrollment
options.description: Disable re-enrollment attempts if related plugins return invalid

options.name: --disable_tables
options.description: Comma-delimited list of table names to be disabled

options.name: --disable_watchdog
options.description: Disable userland watchdog process

options.name: --enable_extensions_watchdog
options.description: Enable userland watchdog for extensions processes

options.name: --enable_tables
options.description: Comma-delimited list of table names to be enabled

options.name: --enroll_always
options.description: On startup, send a new enrollment request

options.name: --enroll_secret_env
options.description: Name of environment variable holding enrollment-auth secret

options.name: --enroll_secret_path
options.description: Path to an optional client enrollment-auth secret

options.name: --enroll_tls_endpoint
options.description: TLS/HTTPS endpoint for client enrollment

options.name: --extensions_autoload
options.description: Optional path to a list of autoloaded & managed extensions

options.name: --extensions_interval
options.description: Seconds delay between connectivity checks

options.name: --extensions_require
options.description: Comma-separated list of required extensions

options.name: --extensions_socket
options.description: Path to the extensions UNIX domain socket

options.name: --extensions_timeout
options.description: Seconds to wait for autoloaded extensions

options.name: --force
options.description: Force osqueryd to kill previously-running daemons

options.name: --install
options.description: Install osqueryd as a service

options.name: --logger_mode
options.description: Octal mode for log files (default '0640')

options.name: --logger_plugin
options.description: Logger plugin name

options.name: --logger_stderr
options.description: Write status logs to stderr

options.name: --logtostderr
options.description: Log messages to stderr in addition to the logger plugin(s)

options.name: --pidfile
options.description: Path to the daemon pidfile mutex

options.name: --proxy_hostname
options.description: Optional HTTP proxy hostname

options.name: --stderrthreshold
options.description: Stderr log level threshold

options.name: --tls_client_cert
options.description: Optional path to a TLS client-auth PEM certificate

options.name: --tls_client_key
options.description: Optional path to a TLS client-auth PEM private key

options.name: --tls_enroll_max_attempts
options.description: The total number of attempts that will be made to the enroll endpoint if a request fails, 0 for infinite

options.name: --tls_enroll_max_interval
options.description: Maximum wait time in seconds between enroll retry attempts

options.name: --tls_hostname
options.description: TLS/HTTPS hostname for Config, Logger, and Enroll plugins

options.name: --tls_server_certs
options.description: Optional path to a TLS server PEM certificate(s) bundle

options.name: --tls_session_reuse
options.description: Reuse TLS session sockets

options.name: --tls_session_timeout
options.description: TLS session keep alive timeout in seconds

options.name: --uninstall
options.description: Uninstall osqueryd as a service

options.name: --watchdog_delay
options.description: Initial delay in seconds before watchdog starts

options.name: --watchdog_forced_shutdown_delay
options.description: Seconds that the watchdog will wait to do a forced shutdown after a graceful shutdown request, when a resource limit is hit

options.name: --watchdog_latency_limit
options.description: Override watchdog profile CPU utilization latency limit

options.name: --watchdog_level
options.description: Performance limit level

options.name: --watchdog_memory_limit
options.description: Override watchdog profile memory limit (e.g., 300, for 300MB)

options.name: --watchdog_utilization_limit
options.description: Override watchdog profile CPU utilization limit

options.name: --audit_allow_config
options.description: Allow the audit publisher to change auditing configuration

options.name: --audit_allow_fim_events
options.description: Allow the audit publisher to install filesystem-related rules

options.name: --audit_allow_process_events
options.description: Allow the audit publisher to install process-related rules

options.name: --audit_allow_sockets
options.description: Allow the audit publisher to install socket-related rules

options.name: --audit_allow_user_events
options.description: Allow the audit publisher to install user-related rules

options.name: --augeas_lenses
options.description: Directory that contains augeas lenses files

options.name: --aws_access_key_id
options.description: AWS access key ID

options.name: --aws_debug
options.description: Enable AWS SDK debug logging

options.name: --aws_enable_proxy
options.description: Enable proxying of HTTP/HTTPS requests in AWS client config

options.name: --aws_firehose_endpoint
options.description: Custom Firehose endpoint

options.name: --aws_firehose_period
options.description: Seconds between flushing logs to Firehose (default 10)

options.name: --aws_firehose_stream
options.description: Name of Firehose stream for logging

options.name: --aws_kinesis_disable_log_status
options.description: Disable status logs processing

options.name: --aws_kinesis_endpoint
options.description: Custom Kinesis endpoint

options.name: --aws_kinesis_period
options.description: Seconds between flushing logs to Kinesis (default 10)

options.name: --aws_kinesis_random_partition_key
options.description: Enable random kinesis partition keys

options.name: --aws_kinesis_stream
options.description: Name of Kinesis stream for logging

options.name: --aws_profile_name
options.description: AWS profile for authentication and region configuration

options.name: --aws_proxy_host
options.description: Proxy host for use in AWS client config

options.name: --aws_proxy_password
options.description: Proxy password for use in AWS client config

options.name: --aws_proxy_port
options.description: Proxy port for use in AWS client config

options.name: --aws_proxy_scheme
options.description: Proxy HTTP scheme for use in AWS client config (http or https, default https)

options.name: --aws_proxy_username
options.description: Proxy username for use in AWS client config

options.name: --aws_region
options.description: AWS region

options.name: --aws_secret_access_key
options.description: AWS secret access key

options.name: --aws_session_token
options.description: AWS STS session token

options.name: --aws_sts_arn_role
options.description: AWS STS ARN role

options.name: --aws_sts_region
options.description: AWS STS region

options.name: --aws_sts_session_name
options.description: AWS STS session name

options.name: --aws_sts_timeout
options.description: AWS STS assume role credential validity in seconds (default 3600)

options.name: --buffered_log_max
options.description: Maximum number of logs in buffered output plugins (0 = unlimited)

options.name: --decorations_top_level
options.description: Add decorators as top level JSON objects

options.name: --disable_audit
options.description: Disable receiving events from the audit subsystem

options.name: --disable_caching
options.description: Disable scheduled query caching

options.name: --disable_database
options.description: Disable the persistent RocksDB storage

options.name: --disable_decorators
options.description: Disable log result decoration

options.name: --disable_distributed
options.description: Disable distributed queries (default true)

options.name: --disable_endpointsecurity
options.description: Disable receiving events from the EndpointSecurity subsystem

options.name: --disable_endpointsecurity_fim
options.description: Disable file events from the EndpointSecurity subsystem

options.name: --disable_events
options.description: Disable osquery publish/subscribe system

options.name: --disable_hash_cache
options.description: Cache calculated file hashes, re-calculate only if inode times change

options.name: --disable_logging
options.description: Disable ERROR/INFO logging

options.name: --distributed_interval
options.description: Seconds between polling for new queries (default 60)

options.name: --distributed_loginfo
options.description: Log the running distributed queries name at INFO level

options.name: --distributed_plugin
options.description: Distributed plugin name

options.name: --distributed_tls_max_attempts
options.description: Number of times to attempt a request

options.name: --distributed_tls_read_endpoint
options.description: TLS/HTTPS endpoint for distributed query retrieval

options.name: --distributed_tls_write_endpoint
options.description: TLS/HTTPS endpoint for distributed query results

options.name: --docker_socket
options.description: Docker UNIX domain socket path

options.name: --enable_file_events
options.description: Enables the file_events publisher

options.name: --enable_foreign
options.description: Enable no-op foreign virtual tables

options.name: --enable_keyboard_events
options.description: Enable listening for keyboard events

options.name: --enable_mouse_events
options.description: Enable listening for mouse events

options.name: --enable_numeric_monitoring
options.description: Enable numeric monitoring system

options.name: --ephemeral
options.description: Skip pidfile and database state checks

options.name: --es_fim_mute_path_literal
options.description: Comma delimited list of path literals to be muted for FIM

options.name: --es_fim_mute_path_prefix
options.description: Comma delimited list of path prefxes to be muted for FIM

options.name: --events_expiry
options.description: Timeout to expire event subscriber results

options.name: --events_max
options.description: Maximum number of event batches per type to buffer

options.name: --events_optimize
options.description: Optimize subscriber select queries (scheduler only)

options.name: --extensions_default_index
options.description: Enable INDEX on all extension table columns (default true)

options.name: --hash_cache_max
options.description: Size of LRU file hash cache

options.name: --host_identifier
options.description: Field used to identify the host running osquery (hostname, uuid, instance, ephemeral, specified)

options.name: --logger_event_type
options.description: Log scheduled results as events

options.name: --logger_kafka_acks
options.description: The number of acknowledgments the leader has to receive (0, 1, 'all')

options.name: --logger_kafka_brokers
options.description: Bootstrap broker(s) as a comma-separated list of host or host:port (default port 9092)

options.name: --logger_kafka_compression
options.description: Compression codec to use for compressing message sets ('none' or 'gzip')

options.name: --logger_kafka_topic
options.description: Kafka topic to publish logs under

options.name: --logger_min_status
options.description: Minimum level for status log recording

options.name: --logger_min_stderr
options.description: Minimum level for statuses written to stderr

options.name: --logger_numerics
options.description: Use numeric JSON syntax for numeric values

options.name: --logger_path
options.description: Directory path for ERROR/WARN/INFO and results logging

options.name: --logger_rotate
options.description: Use filesystem log rotation

options.name: --logger_rotate_max_files
options.description: Max number of files to keep in rotation

options.name: --logger_rotate_size
options.description: Size for each filesystem log in bytes

options.name: --logger_snapshot_event_type
options.description: Log scheduled snapshot results as events

options.name: --logger_syslog_facility
options.description: Syslog facility for status and results logs (0-23, default 19)

options.name: --logger_syslog_prepend_cee
options.description: Prepend @cee: tag to logged JSON messages

options.name: --logger_tls_compress
options.description: GZip compress TLS/HTTPS request body

options.name: --logger_tls_endpoint
options.description: TLS/HTTPS endpoint for results logging

options.name: --logger_tls_max_lines
options.description: Max number of logs to send per period

options.name: --logger_tls_max_linesize
options.description: Max size in bytes allowed per log line

options.name: --logger_tls_period
options.description: Seconds between flushing logs over TLS/HTTPS

options.name: --nullvalue
options.description: Set string for NULL values, default ''

options.name: --numeric_monitoring_filesystem_path
options.description: File to dump numeric monitoring records one per line. The format of the line is <PATH><TAB><VALUE><TAB><TIMESTAMP>

options.name: --numeric_monitoring_plugins
options.description: Comma separated numeric monitoring plugins names

options.name: --numeric_monitoring_pre_aggregation_time
options.description: Time period in seconds for numeric monitoring pre-aggregation buffer

options.name: --pack_delimiter
options.description: Delimiter for pack and query names

options.name: --pack_refresh_interval
options.description: Cache expiration for a packs discovery queries

options.name: --read_max
options.description: Maximum file read size

options.name: --schedule_default_interval
options.description: Query interval to use if none is provided

options.name: --schedule_epoch
options.description: Epoch for scheduled queries

options.name: --schedule_lognames
options.description: Log the running scheduled query name at INFO level

options.name: --schedule_max_drift
options.description: Max time drift in seconds

options.name: --schedule_reload
options.description: Interval in seconds to reload database arenas

options.name: --schedule_splay_percent
options.description: Percent to splay config times

options.name: --schedule_timeout
options.description: Limit the schedule to a duration in seconds, 0 for no limit

options.name: --specified_identifier
options.description: Field used to specify the host_identifier when set to 'specified'

options.name: --table_delay
options.description: Add an optional microsecond delay between table scans

options.name: --table_exceptions
options.description: Allow tables to throw exceptions

options.name: --thrift_string_size_limit
options.description: Sets the maximum string size allowed in a thrift message, use 0 for unlimited

options.name: --thrift_timeout
options.description: Timeout for thrift socket operations

options.name: --thrift_verbose
options.description: Enable the thrift log handler

options.name: --tls_disable_status_log
options.description: Disable sending status logs

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose informational messages

options.name: --worker_threads
options.description: Number of work dispatch threads

options.name: --yara_delay
options.description: Time in ms to sleep after scan of each file (default 50) to reduce memory spikes

options.name: --A
options.description: Select all from a table

options.name: --L
options.description: List all table names

options.name: --connect
options.description: Connect to an extension socket

options.name: --csv
options.description: Set output mode to 'csv'

options.name: --extension
options.description: Path to a single extension to autoload

options.name: --header
options.description: Toggle column headers true/false

options.name: --json
options.description: Set output mode to 'json'

options.name: --json_pretty
options.description: Set output mode to 'json_pretty'

options.name: --line
options.description: Set output mode to 'line'

options.name: --list
options.description: Set output mode to 'list'

options.name: --pack
options.description: Run all queries in a pack

options.name: --planner
options.description: Enable osquery runtime planner output

options.name: --profile
options.description: Enable profile mode when non-0, set number of iterations

options.name: --separator
options.description: Set output field separator, default '|'
